shared_properties: Silhouette fits inside 120x180 px with a high collar, staff hand, and academy champion stance readable from the upper-right lane.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while spell charge colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The character uses the same 2 px outline discipline and ornate academy trim language as the player asset set.
differences: Eight frames cycle between poised idle and active casting preparation with a brighter wand gem and robe sleeve motion.
The stance faces downward-left so the enemy clearly targets the player lane.
The upper body raises during the charge frames to support forecast icon timing before projectile release.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load enemy_caster_duel_loop.png during Loading and build a 4x2 TextureAtlasLayout before enemy spawn.
runtime_notes: Use idle frames at 6 FPS and accelerate to 10 FPS during the pre-cast forecast beat if the state machine exposes a charge flag.
Anchor the enemy to the upper podium so the projectile spawn point remains stable across all frames.
The casting hand should stay clear of the forecast icon anchor so UI overlays do not cover the silhouette.

context.usage: Displayed for the active duel opponent during idle, spell charge, and launch anticipation beats.

silhouette_notes: High collar and staff head remain readable at 50% preview scale.
Casting hand always points toward the player lane.
Robe hem stays above the upper podium floor line.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 480x360 px for eight 120x180 frames with no frame gutter.
The enemy silhouette remains readable against gold-trimmed windows and dark wall pillars.
The casting hand movement clearly escalates between idle frames and charge frames.
